alt: Sea otter face showing nose whiskers and dense fur
caption: Dense fur keeps cold ocean water away from a sea otter's skin.
acquisitionNotes: Core article image curated separately from the otter gallery set. Re-synced canonical Commons URL. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/a/a8/Enhydra_lutris_sea_otter_face_photo.jpg
